titleStmt.title: SII 28.305: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 305. (A.R. No. 459 of 1913.) TAḌĀVŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a royal order addressed to the tānattār of the temple of Tiruvēkambam-uḍaiyār of Tiḍāvūr intimating them the grant of the dry-crop land after leaving out 7000 kuḻi of wet crop land in the bloc called Veṉṟa-perumāḷ that was kāṇippaṟṟu, situated along the main channel (tala-kāl) outside the village, which was lying waste overgrown with wood, as kuḍi-nīṅga-dēvadāṉa-iṟai-ili (tax-free land without the involvement of the ejection of the erstwhile possessors). The tānattār were asked to arrange for the bringing of the land under cultivation with the help of the channel and dam in due proportion to the extent of the land under the crop. With the help of this grant, they were to maintain the worship of the God, carry out necessary repairs to the temple and also meet the expenses on the day of the festival. The order was attested by Ādittaṉ Gaṇavati-āḻvāṉ alias Vāṇādarāyan of Kappalūr alias Ulagaḷanda-chōḻanallūr in Muttūr-kūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷicceyal tiṭāvūril Uṭaiyār tiruvekampamuṭaiyār koyilt tāṉattārkku I
vvūr veḷiyil veṉṟa perumāḷeṉ talakāl vaḻi kāṇippaṟṟāṉa nilam Aṉaittāṇṭum pāḻāy kāṭeḻuṉtu ki
ṭakkayil patiṉeḻāvatu vaikāci mātam mutal Iṉnāyaṉārkku kuṭiniṅkā tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭa nilattukkellaiyā
vatu kiḻellai Āṟṟukku meṟkum teṉnellai Oṭaikkum vārapaṟṟukku vaṭakkum mel Ellai Iṉnāyaṉār paḻa
ṉ tevatāṉa Iṟaiyilikku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Āṟṟukku teṟkkum Iṉṉāṉkkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉce ku
ḻi Eḻāyiramum nīkki Uḷḷa puṉceyum kuṭi niṅkā tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Iṉnilam kaik
koṇṭu veṭṭittiruttip payiṟceyyavum payiṟceyyumiṭattu kampantūmpu maṭaiyāl nīrpāyavum kāl te
vai Aṇaittevai ceyyumaḷavil payirreṟiṉa nila viḻukkāṭṭile tevai ceyyavum Ippaṭikku payiṟccey
vittuk koṇṭu Iṉnāyaṉārkku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum tirunāḷaḻivukkum Uṭalāka poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉait
tāyamum Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyiliyāka koṇṭu cantirātittavaraiyum celka Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṇṭi maṇ
ṭalattu muttūrkkūṟṟattu kappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷanta coḻanallūr Ātittaṉ kaṇavati Āḻvāṉāṉa vāṇātarāya
ṉeḻuttu— tulyam—After some space the following line is inscribed kālai eḻu itu kaṅkaṉāṭāḻvāṉ āṇai āḷāka and two other letters the latter of which in a inscribed is detached space.
Digital edition of SII 28.305 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
